headline: Enphase Energy Opens U.S. Pre-Orders for GaN-Based 548 VA IQ9S Commercial Microinverters
summary: FREMONT, Calif., May 13, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Enphase Energy, Inc. (NASDAQ: ENPH), a global energy technology company, today opened U.S. pre-orders for the new IQ9S-3P™ Commercial Microinverter, its most powerful microinverter to date. Built with advanced gallium nitride (GaN) technology, the IQ9S-3P Commercial Microinverter supports high-wattage solar panels up to 770 W and connects directly to three-phase 480Y/277 V (wye) grid configurations without requiring external transformers. Togethe
